title: feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: Conventional Commits format 'feat: add ...' — must use project format e.g. 'frontend: Sidebar: Add configurable external links via Helm values'.
safeLinkUrl returns url.toLowerCase() — lowercases case-sensitive URL paths. Should return original url: return lower.startsWith('http://') || lower.startsWith('https://') ? url : null.
Backend CI tests reported failing by @illume; verify cd backend && go test ./... passes.
Confirm koanf HEADLAMP_CONFIG_EXTERNAL_LINKS env var maps correctly to external-links key.
externalLinks initialised as empty slice (not nil) ensures JSON always emits [] not null.
externalLinks added to Helm JSON schema with correct type for operator validation.
